visible_observations: A dark-skinned pointed-ear humanoid with spiked hair, deeply lined features, and a slight smile stands in a wide stance while pressing a wooden-handled stamp onto a long printed ledger sheet.
The figure wears dense black and brown layered scale-like clothing, wrapped forearms and shins, pointed shoulder panels, boots, and a medallion.
The stamping gesture, long receipt-like paper, and layered clerk-warrior clothing create a specific bureaucratic occupation.
defects: The downward gaze, small smile, careful two-handed stamping action, and absence of a visible weapon read as routine administrative work rather than immediate combat threat.
Deep forehead, eye, cheek, and mouth lines give the face an older or weathered age read that competes with the otherwise sturdy body.
The stamp and ledger dominate the action but do not visibly explain an attack, defense, target, or bodily cost.
Nearly every garment surface is dark, tightly patterned, and similarly valued, causing torso, skirt panels, trousers, wraps, and boots to merge.
uncertainties: The isolated image does not establish whether stamping the paper has a supernatural or combat consequence.
The apparent age could come from species anatomy, facial carving, or actual aging; the image provides no separate age cue.
The eyes appear nearly closed or lowered, making the intended target of attention difficult to determine.

visible_observations: Three labeled candidates show the same pointed-ear humanoid, layered pointed skirt and shoulders, stamp, and pale curling paper in a left lean, upright frontal stance, and rightward lunge.
The paper remains unfilled light negative space while the body and stamp are rendered as dark silhouettes.
defects: The three candidates change weight distribution and paper curve but retain essentially the same body plan, costume outline, prop, and stamping action.
The pale paper carries much of the readable action yet does not function as part of the black outer silhouette.
All candidates keep both hands close to the small stamp, producing compact arm shapes with little attack direction or reach.
uncertainties: The A, B, and C labels do not explicitly state which candidate was selected.
Because the sheet is shown as interior light space, its edge readability on a dark or complex use background remains unknown.

visible_observations: The head tilts slightly down and to one side, with heavily folded eyelids, deep facial creases, a broad nose, closed lips forming a faint smile, long pointed ears, and swept spikes of hair.
Fine raised or incised patterns cover the forehead and cheeks; the hands and stamp enter the lower edge of the crop.
defects: The lowered eyes and faint smile read as calm concentration, satisfaction, or gentle amusement rather than hostility.
Deep creasing around the eyes, forehead, cheeks, and mouth creates a visibly older or fatigued facial impression.
The eyes are too lowered or closed to establish viewer or target fixation, and the mouth shows little tension.
The face does not visibly react to the stamp, paper, or any supernatural effect.
uncertainties: Unaided viewing cannot determine whether the expression is smug, kind, tired, resigned, or merely focused on the task.
It is unclear whether the facial lines are age, species structure, scars, or decorative surface pattern.

visible_observations: At native size, the pointed ears, spiked head, bent arms, wide legs, pale hanging paper, and small stamping gesture remain visible.
The pale paper is the brightest and most immediately readable element against the dark figure and background.
defects: The face, eye direction, wrinkles, stamp detail, ledger printing, garment layers, and skin markings collapse at this size.
Dark clothing, limbs, and background merge into a compact humanoid mass.
The surviving paper-and-stamp read suggests a clerk or printer more strongly than a combat role or threat.
uncertainties: No neighboring unit icons, gameplay background, selection frame, or motion state are shown, so in-context recognition and the paper's actual visibility cannot be determined.
